name: privacyscript
description: PrivacyScript by TekDruid — client-side health record de-identification.

scripts.dev: node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.js && node scripts/copy-ort-wasm.js && node scripts/copy-tesseract-assets.js && next dev
scripts.build: node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.js && node scripts/copy-ort-wasm.js && node scripts/copy-tesseract-assets.js && next build
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.js && node scripts/copy-ort-wasm.js && node scripts/copy-tesseract-assets.js
